creator: darcy@druid.net
text:
On Mon, 5 Mar 2007 00:00:25 UT
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/generate,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/109884 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/109884

That link says that there are no matching PRs.  However, I saw the
email and it looks fine.  It's just an update to the latest version.
